mapper.select: select id, id_string, title from recipe where display_flg = true order by created_date DESC, id DESC limit 5;
select id, id_string, title from recipe where display_flg = true and recommend_flg = true order by created_date DESC limit 6;
select id, id_string, title from recipe where display_flg = true order by random() limit 6;
select id, id_string, title from recipe where display_flg = true order by random() limit 12;

select r.id, r.id_string, r.title, r.memo, r.created_date, t1.id AS tag1_id, t1.tag1_name, t2.id AS tag2_id, t2.tag2_name, m.id AS matelial_id, m.material_name, h.how_to_no1, h.how_to_no2, h.how_to_no3, h.how_to_no4, h.how_to_no5, h.how_to_no6, h.how_to_no7, h.how_to_no8, h.how_to_no9, h.how_to_no10, me.description from recipe r left outer join recipe_tag rt on r.id = rt.recipe_id left outer join tag1 t1 on rt.tag1_id = t1.id left outer join recipe_tag2 rt2 on r.id = rt2.recipe_id left outer join tag2 t2 on rt2.tag2_id = t2.id left outer join material m on r.id = m.recipe_id left outer join how_to h on r.id = h.recipe_id left outer join meta me on r.id = me.recipe_id where r.id_string = #{idString} and r.display_flg = true order by m.sort_order, t1.sort_order, t2.sort_order ;
select id, id_string, title from recipe where display_flg = true order by created_date DESC

select DISTINCT r.id, r.id_string, r.title, r.created_date from recipe AS r left join material AS m on r.id = m.recipe_id where r.display_flg = true
AND (
r.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
OR
m.material_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
)
order by r.created_date DESC

select DISTINCT r.id, r.id_string, r.title, r.created_date from recipe r left outer join recipe_tag rt on r.id = rt.recipe_id left outer join tag1 t1 on rt.tag1_id = t1.id left outer join recipe_tag2 rt2 on r.id = rt2.recipe_id left outer join tag2 t2 on rt2.tag2_id = t2.id where
t1.tag1_name like CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%') or t2.tag2_name like CONCAT('%', #{tag}, '%')
order by r.created_date DESC
